name_en: Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
name_cn:
Balenciaga | Hourglass bag has a new look again! !
From Balenciaga 22 Fall/Winter series - Crush Handbag
The powerful, practical large bag is back!
Breaking the traditional stiff bag shape, it features stitched soft calfskin paired with a rugged metal slider chain strap, allowing you to freely switch between single shoulder and crossbody styles. A casual and atmospheric vibe!
Large 32cm Small 26cm
